text.title: Cold Outreach Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Cold Outreach.

example.scenario: Solo agency founder, ICP = Series-A SaaS heads of data, 180 prospects sourced from LinkedIn Sales Nav.
example.trace: list (180) → 4-step sequence, body 3 sentences → throttle 30/day (week 1) → stop on reply+bounce → cycle review week 3: 18 replies, 4 calls, 1 deal
